Package global.thalion.ttio.protection

package global.thalion.ttio.protection
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    global.thalion.ttio
     
  • Class
    Description
    AccessPolicy
    Access policy describing who may decrypt which streams in an .tio file.
    Anonymizer
    Applies caller-selected policies to a dataset and writes a new .tio file.
    Anonymizer.AnonymizationPolicy
     
    Anonymizer.AnonymizationResult
     
    CipherSuite
    Cipher-suite catalog and algorithm-dispatched parameter helpers (v0.7 M48).
    CipherSuite.Category
    Category tag for catalog entries.
    CipherSuite.Entry
    Catalog entry.
    CipherSuite.InvalidKeyException
    Thrown when a key's length does not match the selected algorithm.
    CipherSuite.Status
    Status tag; only CipherSuite.Status.ACTIVE algorithms may be used for encrypt / sign / wrap operations.
    CipherSuite.UnsupportedAlgorithmException
    Thrown when a caller specifies an algorithm not in the catalog, or one with status RESERVED (activates in a later milestone).
    EncryptedTransport
    v1.0 transport layer for per-AU encrypted files.
    EncryptionManager
    AES-256-GCM encryption/decryption for TTI-O datasets.
    EncryptionManager.EncryptResult
    Result of an encryption operation.
    EncryptionManager.WrappedBlobV2
    Parsed v1.2 wrapped-key blob fields.
    KeyRotationManager
    Envelope encryption and key rotation for TTI-O datasets.
    PerAUEncryption
    v1.0 per-Access-Unit encryption primitives.
    PerAUEncryption.AUHeaderPlaintext
    Plaintext form of the 36-byte AU semantic header.
    PerAUEncryption.ChannelSegment
    One encrypted row of a <channel>_segments compound dataset.
    PerAUEncryption.GcmResult
    Result of a per-AU encryption: (iv, tag, ciphertext).
    PerAUEncryption.HeaderSegment
    One encrypted row of spectrum_index/au_header_segments.
    PerAUFile
    v1.0 file-level per-Access-Unit encryption orchestrator.
    PerAUFile.DecryptedRun
    Result of PerAUFile.decryptFile(java.lang.String, byte[], java.lang.String): per-run, per-channel plaintext float64 LE bytes; optional auHeaders list when opt_encrypted_au_headers is set.
    PostQuantumCrypto
    Post-quantum crypto primitives — ML-KEM-1024 (FIPS 203) and ML-DSA-87 (FIPS 204).
    PostQuantumCrypto.KemEncapResult
    Encapsulation result: KEM ciphertext and the shared secret.
    PostQuantumCrypto.KeyPair
    Immutable raw-bytes keypair.
    SignatureManager
    HMAC-SHA256 signatures with v2 canonical little-endian format for TTI-O datasets.
    Verifier
    High-level verification API.
    Verifier.Status
    Sign-and-verify cycle outcome.
